## Schema.virtual() method

Creates a virtual property on the schema

**Signature:**

```typescript
virtual(key: string): VirtualType<RawDocType>;
```

## Parameters

<table><thead><tr><th>

Parameter


</th><th>

Type


</th><th>

Description


</th></tr></thead>
<tbody><tr><td>

key


</td><td>

string


</td><td>

name of the virtual property


</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

VirtualType&lt;RawDocType&gt;

created virtual property

## Example


```ts
const userSchema = new Schema({
 firstName: String,
 lastName: String,
});

userSchema.virtual('fullName').get(function() {
 return `${this.firstName} ${this.lastName}`;
});
```
